summary: Nice audio quality lets listeners enjoy this early show even though no specific performance highlights are noted.
review: Both reviewers praised the sound, describing it as nice and good, making the recording pleasant to listen to. Aside from noting that it was their first Dead experience, they offered no details on the musical performance or set flow.

ai_rating.rationale: Average of reviewer star ratings (4 and 3) with limited commentary; positive remarks about audio but no insight on the show itself.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers mention the audio as 'nice' and 'good' with no reported issues, but provide no specifics on source or mixing.
